node.text: Dave helped his neighbor fix a car engine which he found a therapeutic and relaxing experience.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car fix relief emotion") on Session 7 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave finds working on cars therapeutic and relaxing, particularly restoring an old Ford Mustang found in a junkyard.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car fix relief emotion") on Session 21 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Working on cars is like therapy for Dave and a way to get away from everyday stress. He sees it as more than a hobby, but a passion.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car fix relief emotion") on Session 22 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave finds fixing cars like therapy and feels fulfilled by refurbishing them, stemming from working on cars with his dad.

node.text: Restoring things can be tough for Dave, but the feeling of accomplishment it gives him is great.

node.text: Dave expressed satisfaction in bringing an old car back to life and transforming it into something beautiful.
